server/src/main/java/com/azvtech/sppo/se.general_idea: Enable Eureka server functionality by adding the EnableEurekaServer annotation to the Spring Boot application class.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK.
Update the Maven group ID to reflect a new project namespace.
Update the Maven artifact ID to reflect the new project name.
Update the display name of the project.
Change the project packaging type to pom, indicating it is now a parent or aggregator module.
Add Spring Cloud starter parent to dependency management to manage Spring Cloud dependencies.

.idea/compiler.xml.general_idea: Update IntelliJ IDEA compiler configuration to reflect new module names and target bytecode levels for the migration.
.idea/compiler.xml.human_impl: Replaced single 'server' module entries with multiple 'sppo-management-*' module entries and set bytecode targets to 19 or 1.5.
